name: Pagans Passage
description: Pagans Passage is an action game where you lead druids to complete 10 rituals to awaken The Old One. Shoot enemies to aid the druids in their goal, collect various artifacts, and try to get on the leaderboard!
instructions: Use numbers 1 2 and 3 to select the colors green blue and red for both bridges and skulls Hit space to shoot from the skull selected Left click anywhere on the swamp to place a tile bridge of the selected color Right click to remove a tile When
